title: Rebecca Watches Her Father Fight
description: Pages 8–12 focus on rebecca watches her father fight, keeping the Dressrosa conflict and character roles clear for display.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 as kyros faces Diamante in the flower field, defending Rebecca and settling Dressrosa's deepest family wound.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Further provide aid for you bad people!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Damn it, now's not the time to be smitten!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: And who did you call a once-in-a-thousand- years beauty?

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: I guess this means you don't care what becomes of your friends in the factory, eh?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: E... even if I heal their wounds, they'll just go out and inflict more harm on someone else, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: You're a cheeky one, aren't you?! No matter, come what may, I'm going to literally squeeze every last drop of power out of you!

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: Hurry ahead Leo! I'll be right behind you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Ah, so that's how it is- Zamasu...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Your tears are capable of healing as well, huh...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: Then cry! Cry me a friggin' river!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Come now! More! Let flow your tears of healing!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: Giola has become aware of the healing power of manshelly's tears!

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: She's subjecting the princess to horrible violence in an effort to make her shed those tears!

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: The Tontatta Princess has healing powers!? Now wonder the enemy wants to keep her under lock and key!

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: The heal-heal fruit essentially grants one the power to heal the wounds of any living being.

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo Family
dialogue.text: Giola's trying to use that very power to revive the defeated executives!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: WhaAat! If she succeeds then there'll basically be no end to our enemies!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo Family
dialogue.text: Don't tell me... Sugar is included among those executives as well!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: Oh, so close- Zamasu! Wakey, wakey, execu- tives!

summary: Rebecca Watches Her Father Fight advances the Dressrosa story through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, with unclear voices kept readable rather than forced into unsafe speaker assignments.
